text:
العربي:
أنا عميل لشركة سامسونج منذ سنوات، وكنت أشتري أحدث هواتفها تقريبًا كل عام. لكن للأسف تجربتي هذا العام كانت مخيبة للآمال بشكل كبير.
طريقة بيع المنتجات هذا العام غير منظمة، وخدمة العملاء كانت غير مهنية وبطيئة جدًا في الرد، ولم يكن هناك اهتمام حقيقي بحل المشكلة. هذا أمر غير مقبول من شركة عالمية بحجم سامسونج.
بصراحة أشعر باستياء شديد من هذه التجربة، وإذا استمر مستوى الخدمة بهذا الشكل فلن أفكر في شراء منتجات سامسونج مرة أخرى، بل قد أفكر في الانتقال إلى شركة أخرى.
أتمنى أن تقوم سامسونج بمراجعة مستوى خدمة العملاء وتحسين تجربة الشراء، لأن العملاء الأوفياء يستحقون معاملة أفضل من ذلك.
---
English:
I have been a Samsung customer for many years and I usually purchase the latest Samsung phone almost every year. Unfortunately, my experience this year has been extremely disappointing.
The product purchasing process this year has been poorly organized, and the customer service representatives have been unprofessional and very slow to respond. There was no real effort to properly resolve the issue. This level of service is unacceptable from a global company like Samsung.
Honestly, I am very frustrated with this experience. If this level of service continues, I will seriously consider switching to another brand.
I hope Samsung reviews the quality of its customer service and improves the purchasing experience, because loyal customers deserve a much better experience.

text:
لا تشتروا سامسونج، أنا حقًا أشعر بخيبة أمل كبيرة من تجربتي الأخيرة.

بعد تحديث البرنامج، ظهرت فجأة مشكلة خط أخضر على شاشة هاتفي - مع العلم أنه لا يوجد أي تلف مادي أو ناتج عن الماء. الأمر المحبط هو أن هذا حدث بعد ثلاث سنوات فقط من انتهاء فترة الضمان، مما جعلني غير مؤهل لاستبدال الشاشة لمرة واحدة ببضعة أيام فقط.

بصراحة، أشعر بالظلم عندما تظهر مثل هذه المشاكل مباشرة بعد التحديثات، مما يترك العملاء يتحملون التكلفة. لطالما وثقت بأجهزة سامسونج واستخدمتها في عائلتي، لكن هذه التجربة كانت مزعجة للغاية.

آمل أن تتحمل سامسونج مسؤوليتها وأن تدعم العملاء الذين يواجهون هذه المشاكل، حتى لو كان ذلك يتجاوز قليلاً حدود سياسة الضمان.

#مشكلة_الخط_الأخضر #تجربة_سامسونج #دعم_العملاء#

text:
أنا عميل لشركة سامسونج منذ سنوات، وكنت أشتري أحدث هواتفها تقريبًا كل عام. لكن للأسف تجربتي هذا العام كانت مخيبة للآمال بشكل كبير.
طريقة بيع المنتجات هذا العام غير منظمة، وخدمة العملاء كانت غير مهنية وبطيئة جدًا في الرد، ولم يكن هناك اهتمام حقيقي بحل المشكلة. هذا أمر غير مقبول من شركة عالمية بحجم سامسونج.
بصراحة أشعر باستياء شديد من هذه التجربة، وإذا استمر مستوى الخدمة بهذا الشكل فلن أفكر في شراء منتجات سامسونج مرة أخرى، بل قد أفكر في الانتقال إلى شركة أخرى.
أتمنى أن تقوم سامسونج بمراجعة مستوى خدمة العملاء وتحسين تجربة الشراء، لأن العملاء الأوفياء يستحقون معاملة أفضل من ذلك.
:
I have been a Samsung customer for many years and I usually purchase the latest Samsung phone almost every year. Unfortunately, my experience this year has been extremely disappointing.
The product purchasing process this year has been poorly organized, and the customer service representatives have been unprofessional and very slow to respond. There was no real effort to properly resolve the issue. This level of service is unacceptable from a global company like Samsung.
Honestly, I am very frustrated with this experience. If this level of service continues, I will seriously consider switching to another brand.
I hope Samsung reviews the quality of its customer service and improves the purchasing experience, because loyal customers deserve a much better experience.

text:
As a user of the Samsung S series, I acquired an S25 Ultra last year. To protect my device, I installed a high-quality screen protector and a highly recommended phone case. After several months of use, I observed a black spot in the upper right corner of my phone screen, which, upon research, I identified as a dead pixel.
Given that my phone is under warranty, I presented it to a service center in Burjuman. There, two technicians, without conducting a physical inspection, asserted that it was physical damage and therefore not covered under warranty, and their demeanor was unprofessional. I subsequently contacted Samsung Care to report the situation. They registered my complaint and assured me that someone would follow up promptly; however, a month elapsed without any response.
Consequently, I proceeded to pre-order a new S26 Ultra, utilizing the trade-in option. A Samsung representative arrived at my location to inspect the S25 Ultra and informed me that its trade-in value would be significantly diminished due to the pixel damage. Despite my explanation that the device was under warranty, the representative declined to proceed and departed.
I again contacted Samsung Care, and they advised me to deliver the device to a Samsung service center for repair. A few days later, I received a call from Samsung stating that my phone could not be repaired under warranty because the exact cause of the pixel damage could not be determined. They noted the absence of any physical damage to the phone's exterior. The tone of this communication implied a disregard for the customer's perspective. I intend to continue advocating for a resolution until Samsung addresses this issue. @samsunggulf

text: I am extremely disappointed with my recent refrigerator experience in the UAE. The first unit delivered to my home arrived damaged with a clear dent on the door. The replacement unit then arrived without its original carton or factory packaging, which is highly unusual for a brand-new appliance. Even more concerning, the Samsung logo on the door is visibly misaligned, which does not reflect the quality standards expected from Samsung. text:
أنا عميل لشركة سامسونج منذ سنوات، وكنت أشتري أحدث هواتفها تقريبًا كل عام. لكن للأسف تجربتي هذا العام كانت مخيبة للآمال بشكل كبير.
طريقة بيع المنتجات هذا العام غير منظمة، وخدمة العملاء كانت غير مهنية وبطيئة جدًا في الرد، ولم يكن هناك اهتمام حقيقي بحل المشكلة. هذا أمر غير مقبول من شركة عالمية بحجم سامسونج.
بصراحة أشعر باستياء شديد من هذه التجربة، وإذا استمر مستوى الخدمة بهذا الشكل فلن أفكر في شراء منتجات سامسونج مرة أخرى، بل قد أفكر في الانتقال إلى شركة أخرى.
أتمنى أن تقوم سامسونج بمراجعة مستوى خدمة العملاء وتحسين تجربة الشراء، لأن العملاء الأوفياء يستحقون معاملة أفضل من ذلك.
:
I have been a Samsung customer for many years and I usually purchase the latest Samsung phone almost every year. Unfortunately, my experience this year has been extremely disappointing.
The product purchasing process this year has been poorly organized, and the customer service representatives have been unprofessional and very slow to respond. There was no real effort to properly resolve the issue. This level of service is unacceptable from a global company like Samsung.
Honestly, I am very frustrated with this experience. If this level of service continues, I will seriously consider switching to another brand.
I hope Samsung reviews the quality of its customer service and improves the purchasing experience, because loyal customers deserve a much better experience.

​I am writing to formally express my extreme dissatisfaction with the screen repair service and back  provided on my device.
​Not only was I overcharged 300 AED for a back cover that was verbally quoted at 100 AED, but the quality of the work is dangerously substandard. The back cover is currently bulging, and there is a noticeable protrusion when the back of the device is tapped.
​This indicates either a faulty installation or internal pressure, both of which compromise the integrity and safety of the phone. Because the device was returned to me in a worse and potentially hazardous condition, I no longer trust the structural soundess of this unit.
​I am demanding a full replacement of the device with a new unit. I expect to retain the current device as compensation for the gross negligence and the price discrepancy encountered during this process.
​I look forward to your immediate resolution before I escalate this matter to consumer protection authorities.

text:
لا تشتروا سامسونج، أنا حقًا أشعر بخيبة أمل كبيرة من تجربتي الأخيرة.

بعد تحديث البرنامج، ظهرت فجأة مشكلة خط أخضر على شاشة هاتفي - مع العلم أنه لا يوجد أي تلف مادي أو ناتج عن الماء. الأمر المحبط هو أن هذا حدث بعد ثلاث سنوات فقط من انتهاء فترة الضمان، مما جعلني غير مؤهل لاستبدال الشاشة لمرة واحدة ببضعة أيام فقط.

بصراحة، أشعر بالظلم عندما تظهر مثل هذه المشاكل مباشرة بعد التحديثات، مما يترك العملاء يتحملون التكلفة. لطالما وثقت بأجهزة سامسونج واستخدمتها في عائلتي، لكن هذه التجربة كانت مزعجة للغاية.

آمل أن تتحمل سامسونج مسؤوليتها وأن تدعم العملاء الذين يواجهون هذه المشاكل، حتى لو كان ذلك يتجاوز قليلاً حدود سياسة الضمان.

#مشكلة_الخط_الأخضر #تجربة_سامسونج #دعم_العملاء

text:
don't buy samsung I’m really disappointed with my recent experience.

After a software update, my phone suddenly developed a green line issue on the screen — and there’s no physical or water damage at all. What’s frustrating is that this happened just after the 3-year mark, making me ineligible for the one-time screen replacement by just a few days.

It honestly feels unfair when such issues appear right after updates, leaving customers to bear the cost. I’ve always trusted and used Samsung devices in my family, but this experience has been upsetting.

I hope Samsung takes responsibility and supports customers facing these problems, even slightly beyond policy limits.

#GreenLineIssue #SamsungExperience #CustomerSupport

text:
لا تشتروا سامسونج، أنا حقًا أشعر بخيبة أمل كبيرة من تجربتي الأخيرة.

بعد تحديث البرنامج، ظهرت فجأة مشكلة خط أخضر على شاشة هاتفي - مع العلم أنه لا يوجد أي تلف مادي أو ناتج عن الماء. الأمر المحبط هو أن هذا حدث بعد ثلاث سنوات فقط من انتهاء فترة الضمان، مما جعلني غير مؤهل لاستبدال الشاشة لمرة واحدة ببضعة أيام فقط.

بصراحة، أشعر بالظلم عندما تظهر مثل هذه المشاكل مباشرة بعد التحديثات، مما يترك العملاء يتحملون التكلفة. لطالما وثقت بأجهزة سامسونج واستخدمتها في عائلتي، لكن هذه التجربة كانت مزعجة للغاية.

آمل أن تتحمل سامسونج مسؤوليتها وأن تدعم العملاء الذين يواجهون هذه المشاكل، حتى لو كان ذلك يتجاوز قليلاً حدود سياسة الضمان.

#مشكلة_الخط_الأخضر #تجربة_سامسونج #دعم_العملاء

text: CONTEXT: The 16-bit snippet is over-exaggerated, the actual bit depth of this snippet ranges anywhere from 4 to 8 bits. Any digital aliasing in real 16-bit audio would go completely unnoticed by the average listener. In listening tests, nobody could tell the difference between 16-bit abd 24-bit audio. TL;DR: This is just scammy marketing BS.

text:
أنا عميل لشركة سامسونج منذ سنوات، وكنت أشتري أحدث هواتفها تقريبًا كل عام. لكن للأسف تجربتي هذا العام كانت مخيبة للآمال بشكل كبير.
طريقة بيع المنتجات هذا العام غير منظمة، وخدمة العملاء كانت غير مهنية وبطيئة جدًا في الرد، ولم يكن هناك اهتمام حقيقي بحل المشكلة. هذا أمر غير مقبول من شركة عالمية بحجم سامسونج.
بصراحة أشعر باستياء شديد من هذه التجربة، وإذا استمر مستوى الخدمة بهذا الشكل فلن أفكر في شراء منتجات سامسونج مرة أخرى، بل قد أفكر في الانتقال إلى شركة أخرى.
أتمنى أن تقوم سامسونج بمراجعة مستوى خدمة العملاء وتحسين تجربة الشراء، لأن العملاء الأوفياء يستحقون معاملة أفضل من ذلك.
:
I have been a Samsung customer for many years and I usually purchase the latest Samsung phone almost every year. Unfortunately, my experience this year has been extremely disappointing.
The product purchasing process this year has been poorly organized, and the customer service representatives have been unprofessional and very slow to respond. There was no real effort to properly resolve the issue. This level of service is unacceptable from a global company like Samsung.
Honestly, I am very frustrated with this experience. If this level of service continues, I will seriously consider switching to another brand.
I hope Samsung reviews the quality of its customer service and improves the purchasing experience, because loyal customers deserve a much better experience.

text:
لا تشتروا سامسونج، أنا حقًا أشعر بخيبة أمل كبيرة من تجربتي الأخيرة.

بعد تحديث البرنامج، ظهرت فجأة مشكلة خط أخضر على شاشة هاتفي - مع العلم أنه لا يوجد أي تلف مادي أو ناتج عن الماء. الأمر المحبط هو أن هذا حدث بعد ثلاث سنوات فقط من انتهاء فترة الضمان، مما جعلني غير مؤهل لاستبدال الشاشة لمرة واحدة ببضعة أيام فقط.

بصراحة، أشعر بالظلم عندما تظهر مثل هذه المشاكل مباشرة بعد التحديثات، مما يترك العملاء يتحملون التكلفة. لطالما وثقت بأجهزة سامسونج واستخدمتها في عائلتي، لكن هذه التجربة كانت مزعجة للغاية.

آمل أن تتحمل سامسونج مسؤوليتها وأن تدعم العملاء الذين يواجهون هذه المشاكل، حتى لو كان ذلك يتجاوز قليلاً حدود سياسة الضمان.

#مشكلة_الخط_الأخضر #تجربة_سامسونج #دعم_العملاء

text:
don't buy samsung I’m really disappointed with my recent experience.

After a software update, my phone suddenly developed a green line issue on the screen — and there’s no physical or water damage at all. What’s frustrating is that this happened just after the 3-year mark, making me ineligible for the one-time screen replacement by just a few days.

It honestly feels unfair when such issues appear right after updates, leaving customers to bear the cost. I’ve always trusted and used Samsung devices in my family, but this experience has been upsetting.

I hope Samsung takes responsibility and supports customers facing these problems, even slightly beyond policy limits.

#GreenLineIssue #SamsungExperience #CustomerSupport

text:
لا تشتروا سامسونج، أنا حقًا أشعر بخيبة أمل كبيرة من تجربتي الأخيرة.

بعد تحديث البرنامج، ظهرت فجأة مشكلة خط أخضر على شاشة هاتفي - مع العلم أنه لا يوجد أي تلف مادي أو ناتج عن الماء. الأمر المحبط هو أن هذا حدث بعد ثلاث سنوات فقط من انتهاء فترة الضمان، مما جعلني غير مؤهل لاستبدال الشاشة لمرة واحدة ببضعة أيام فقط.

بصراحة، أشعر بالظلم عندما تظهر مثل هذه المشاكل مباشرة بعد التحديثات، مما يترك العملاء يتحملون التكلفة. لطالما وثقت بأجهزة سامسونج واستخدمتها في عائلتي، لكن هذه التجربة كانت مزعجة للغاية.

آمل أن تتحمل سامسونج مسؤوليتها وأن تدعم العملاء الذين يواجهون هذه المشاكل، حتى لو كان ذلك يتجاوز قليلاً حدود سياسة الضمان.

#مشكلة_الخط_الأخضر #تجربة_سامسونج #دعم_العملاء

text:
أنا عميل لشركة سامسونج منذ سنوات، وكنت أشتري أحدث هواتفها تقريبًا كل عام. لكن للأسف تجربتي هذا العام كانت مخيبة للآمال بشكل كبير.
طريقة بيع المنتجات هذا العام غير منظمة، وخدمة العملاء كانت غير مهنية وبطيئة جدًا في الرد، ولم يكن هناك اهتمام حقيقي بحل المشكلة. هذا أمر غير مقبول من شركة عالمية بحجم سامسونج.
بصراحة أشعر باستياء شديد من هذه التجربة، وإذا استمر مستوى الخدمة بهذا الشكل فلن أفكر في شراء منتجات سامسونج مرة أخرى، بل قد أفكر في الانتقال إلى شركة أخرى.
أتمنى أن تقوم سامسونج بمراجعة مستوى خدمة العملاء وتحسين تجربة الشراء، لأن العملاء الأوفياء يستحقون معاملة أفضل من ذلك.
:
I have been a Samsung customer for many years and I usually purchase the latest Samsung phone almost every year. Unfortunately, my experience this year has been extremely disappointing.
The product purchasing process this year has been poorly organized, and the customer service representatives have been unprofessional and very slow to respond. There was no real effort to properly resolve the issue. This level of service is unacceptable from a global company like Samsung.
Honestly, I am very frustrated with this experience. If this level of service continues, I will seriously consider switching to another brand.
I hope Samsung reviews the quality of its customer service and improves the purchasing experience, because loyal customers deserve a much better experience.

text:
I am extremely disappointed with my recent experience with Samsung  Samsung Global Samsung Semiconductor 
I purchased a Samsung S24 Ultra only two months ago on Last November 2025 and the device suddenly powered off  and became completely unresponsive. An official Samsung service center confirmed it is a hardware defect . They have to replace motherboard !!!!
However, I was informed that replacement is “not possible after 2 weeks,” and only repair is being offered. 
For a premium flagship device with a confirmed hardware failure within two months, this is not the level of quality or service I expected from Samsung.
I have always trusted Samsung products, but this situation is very concerning. I respectfully request Samsung Gulf to review this case and provide a fair resolution.

text: I am extremely disappointed with my recent refrigerator experience in the UAE. The first unit delivered to my home arrived damaged with a clear dent on the door. The replacement unit then arrived without its original carton or factory packaging, which is highly unusual for a brand-new appliance. Even more concerning, the Samsung logo on the door is visibly misaligned, which does not reflect the quality standards expected from Samsung. I shared clear photos and a technician visited my home, yet I was told that no replacement will be provided because the refrigerator is ‘working.’ This response is very disappointing from a global brand like Samsung. A brand-new refrigerator should arrive factory sealed, in perfect condition, and with properly aligned Samsung branding.@samsunggulf @samsung

text:
لا تشتروا سامسونج، أنا حقًا أشعر بخيبة أمل كبيرة من تجربتي الأخيرة.

بعد تحديث البرنامج، ظهرت فجأة مشكلة خط أخضر على شاشة هاتفي - مع العلم أنه لا يوجد أي تلف مادي أو ناتج عن الماء. الأمر المحبط هو أن هذا حدث بعد ثلاث سنوات فقط من انتهاء فترة الضمان، مما جعلني غير مؤهل لاستبدال الشاشة لمرة واحدة ببضعة أيام فقط.

بصراحة، أشعر بالظلم عندما تظهر مثل هذه المشاكل مباشرة بعد التحديثات، مما يترك العملاء يتحملون التكلفة. لطالما وثقت بأجهزة سامسونج واستخدمتها في عائلتي، لكن هذه التجربة كانت مزعجة للغاية.

آمل أن تتحمل سامسونج مسؤوليتها وأن تدعم العملاء الذين يواجهون هذه المشاكل، حتى لو كان ذلك يتجاوز قليلاً حدود سياسة الضمان.

#مشكلة_الخط_الأخضر #تجربة_سامسونج #دعم_العملاء

text:
My s22 ultra got the green line on my screen..last software update was done on 20th march 2026 and the green line start to appear on 23rd march 2026...when contacted samsung care their respone was not satisfied...they where like saying its not our responsibility and cant do anything.....when enquired mobile shop they r saying 95 bd to make it proper....
Below are the chat details of samsung facebook..........Hello Rateesh, we hope that you're doing good, feel free to let us know if you need our help regarding the screen on your S22, please let us ask just to clarify, do you mean it has a green line in it? ^Rey.  In that case, let's try to boot the phone in safe mode to see how it goes, please follow the steps below to enter safe mode and let us know if it works: 
Swipe down from the top right of the screen to open the Quick settings panel. Tap the Power icon at the top of the screen.
Touch and hold Power off until the Safe mode icon is displayed. Tap Safe mode to start your device in Safe mode. If you've entered Safe mode successfully, you'll see “Safe mode” displayed at the bottom of the screen.
Let us know if the screen still has the line
^Rey.  We appreciate the confirmation, Ratheesh . Since the green line still appears on the phone display our next steps is reseting  the device to its default settings. To factory reset the device please follow the steps below:
Before you perform a factory reset, be sure to back up your personal data, so you don't lose it all.
1. From Settings, search for and select Factory data reset.
2. Next, tap Factory data reset again, and then review the information.
3. When you're ready, swipe and tap Reset
4. If you have a security lock set on the phone, you will be asked to enter the credentials.
5. To continue with the reset and delete all information stored on your phone, tap Delete all.
6. From there, you will be required to enter your Samsung account's password if you have added a Samsung account to the phone.
7. Your device will reset; when it turns back on, it will start from the initial setup screen.
I hope it helps! ^Aris.......We are sorry to hear you lost all your data, we wanted to avoid this to happen recommen

text:
don't buy samsung I’m really disappointed with my recent experience.

After a software update, my phone suddenly developed a green line issue on the screen — and there’s no physical or water damage at all. What’s frustrating is that this happened just after the 3-year mark, making me ineligible for the one-time screen replacement by just a few days.

It honestly feels unfair when such issues appear right after updates, leaving customers to bear the cost. I’ve always trusted and used Samsung devices in my family, but this experience has been upsetting.

I hope Samsung takes responsibility and supports customers facing these problems, even slightly beyond policy limits.

#GreenLineIssue #SamsungExperience #CustomerSupport

text:
@samsunggulf The #GalaxyUnpacked event is going to be epic! 😍 I'm super excited about the new Samsung Galaxy S25 series, especially the AI-powered features that are taking mobile photography and interaction to the next level 🌟. The ProScaler AI tool is a game-changer, enhancing image scaling quality by 40% and making visuals sharper and brighter 📸. The Virtual Aperture feature is also mind-blowing, giving users DSLR-like control over depth of field and allowing for stunning portrait shots 🎨. And let's not forget the AI Nightography, which takes low-light photography to new heights 🌃. The Multimodal AI agents are also impressive, understanding text, speech, images, and videos to provide seamless interactions 🤖. The One UI 7 AI-powered OS is designed to learn your habits and preferences, offering personalized suggestions and protecting your privacy with on-device AI 💯. With features like Circle to Search 2.0, Audio Eraser, and Auto Trim, the Galaxy S25 is shaping up to be a true AI companion.  Huge thanks to Samsung for this amazing giveaway 🙏. text:
The Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 deliver good but inconsistent performance overall, mainly because of their design choices.They sound clear and detailed, with solid mids and highs and a decent amount of bass. On Samsung devices (with SSC codec), audio quality improves noticeably with richer detail. However, bass can feel inconsistent at higher volumes, and they lack the depth you’d get from dual-driver earbuds. �
Tom's Guide +1

Dear Samsung Support,
Aap ke reply ka shukriya.
Maine apne phone me Bixby Voice ki settings check ki hain, lekin us me sirf English (India) available hai. Urdu language ka option maujood nahi hai.
Urdu Pakistan aur duniya bhar me millions logon ki zaban hai. Agar Bixby me Urdu support add ki jaye to bohat zyada users ke liye asani ho gi, khas taur par un logon ke liye jo English use nahi karte.
Meherbani kar ke future update me Urdu language support add karne par ghour karein.
Shukriya,
Samsung user Toleeb ur rehman

Keep your phone private… 👀

The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra Privacy Display is one of those things you don’t realise you need… until you use it.

It blocks people next to you from seeing your screen, whether you’re commuting, working in a café, or surrounded by those curious office colleagues. You can even hide part of the screen or schedule when it activates.

Honestly one of the smartest privacy features on a smartphone right now.

Follow @emkwan for more Samsung tips, Galaxy features and tech you’ll actually use. 📲 

#samsung #galaxys26ultra #s26ultra #samsungs26ultra

text: I think its a very useful feature you can use it temporarily if you’re in a public space where people sit in close proximity. It does affect the screen quality and it’s noticeable, so I wouldn’t recommend keeping it on all the time. But what I really love about S26U is the horizon lock that is more appealing feature tbh.

text: I am writing to formally escalate my complaint regarding a Samsung refrigerator purchased from Sharaf DG in the UAE. The situation has now become extremely disappointing for me as a Samsung customer. The first refrigerator delivered to my home arrived damaged, with a clear dent on the door. After reporting the issue, Sharaf DG arranged a replacement. However, the replacement unit raised even more serious concerns: • The refrigerator was delivered without its original carton or factory packaging, which is highly unusual for a brand-new appliance. • The Samsung logo on the door is visibly misaligned, which does not reflect the quality or manufacturing standards expected from Samsung. • I have clear photos documenting both issues, which I have already shared. I contacted Samsung support and a technician visited my home. Despite seeing the photos and inspecting the refrigerator, I was informed that no replacement will be provided because the refrigerator is “working.” With respect, this response is unacceptable. I did not purchase a second-hand or previously handled unit. I purchased a brand-new Samsung refrigerator, and it should arrive: • In original sealed packaging • In perfect cosmetic condition • With the correctly aligned Samsung branding A misaligned logo is not a minor detail. It directly affects the brand integrity and authenticity of the product, and it is extremely disappointing that Samsung would consider this acceptable. At this point, my only acceptable resolution is: A replacement refrigerator that is factory sealed, delivered in its original carton, and free from any cosmetic or manufacturing defects. If this matter cannot be resolved promptly, I will unfortunately be forced to escalate the complaint further through the appropriate consumer protection authorities in the UAE.

@samsunggulf The Samsung Galaxy S25 series is packed with mind-blowing features 🚀, but what gets me super excited is the ProScaler AI tool 📸 - imagine upscaling images in real-time, boosting quality by 40%! 😍 The new Virtual Aperture system is also a game-changer, offering pro-grade photo and video capture tools with manual controls 🎥. And let's not forget the Night Video with Audio Eraser 🌃, minimizing noise and allowing for crisp videos even in low-light conditions. The analog-style filters 🎨, enhanced AI capabilities 🤖, and the impressive 50MP ultrawide lens 📸 are just icing on the cake 🎂. With the Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Elite processor, this phone is about to get ridiculously fast 🚀! Huge thanks to the team for this incredible giveaway 🙏. Fingers crossed, hoping to win 😊... text:
I am extremely disappointed with my recent experience with Samsung  Samsung Global Samsung Semiconductor 
I purchased a Samsung S24 Ultra only two months ago on Last November 2025 and the device suddenly powered off  and became completely unresponsive. An official Samsung service center confirmed it is a hardware defect . They have to replace motherboard !!!!
However, I was informed that replacement is “not possible after 2 weeks,” and only repair is being offered. 
For a premium flagship device with a confirmed hardware failure within two months, this is not the level of quality or service I expected from Samsung.
I have always trusted Samsung products, but this situation is very concerning. I respectfully request Samsung Gulf to review this case and provide a fair resolution.

اربط الحذاء، واشحن الكاميرا، ثم دع فضولك يقودك. 
سنحول مهرجان سكة للفنون والتصميم إلى ساحة للتصوير الليلي، في أجواء حافلة بالثقافة والألوان والقصص مع فرصة لربح هاتف Galaxy S25.
انضم إلى @sahalsafar الذي سيقدم لك نصائح عن التصوير المباشر، والأفكار المبتكرة، والكثير من اللقطات المميزة. 🔥
🗓 25 يناير | 7 – 10 مساءً *بسبب تقلّب الأحوال الجوية، تم تأجيل موعد المسابقة إلى 31 يناير 
🗓 29 يناير | 7 – 10 مساءً
👥 20 شخص لكل جولة فقط 
 
متحمس؟
أجب ب "نعم" في خانة التعليقات، وسنراسلك لحجز مكانك.
 
إلى اللقاء في سكة. هيا لنمشِ، نصور ونبتكر.

Lace up your walking shoes, charge your camera, and bring your curiosity. 
We’re turning Sikka Art Festival into a night-time photo playground, packed with culture, colours, stories, and a chance to win a Galaxy S25 (yes, really).

Join @sahalsafar for a guided photowalk with live shooting tips, creative hacks, and plenty of “wait… that shot is 🔥” moments.

🗓 25 Jan | 7–10 PM *Date has been changed to 31st of Jan due to weather conditions 
🗓 29 Jan | 7–10 PM
👥 Only 20 spots per session (because chaos is not a vibe)

Comment Yes and we’ll slide into your DMs to lock your spot.

text:
Hi Samsung Team,
​I am a fan of the Galaxy S-Ultra series and I have a creative suggestion to enhance the premium user experience of the S Pen.
​Currently, we have sound and haptics when inserting the S Pen. However, adding a visual fluid animation would make it even more immersive. My idea is to have a "Jelly-like" visual effect on the screen at the exact location of the S Pen slot.
​When the S Pen is inserted:
​A subtle, translucent tab appears on the edge of the screen.
​As the pen slides in, the tab mimics a fluid/jelly-like displacement, appearing to be pushed inward by the physical pen.
​Once fully docked, a gentle ripple effect occurs before it fades away.
​This small software touch would bridge the gap between hardware and software beautifully, making the S Pen interaction feel more organic and futuristic.
​I hope the One UI development team considers this for future updates!
​Best regards,muthalib k

Samsung takes over CRANK.

This Saturday, 31st, Samsung is taking over CRANK at Alserkal Avenue for a full day of performance, data, and next-level training.

CRANKsters will get hands-on with the Galaxy Watch8 - exploring how it tracks effort, movement, recovery, and real-time workout data. In selected classes, you won’t just see it on display - you’ll train with it, feel the difference, and see your performance come to life as you move.

CRANKsters attending 10am SHAPE, 10:30am RIDE, and 11:30am RIDE will have the chance to use the device during class.

This is where CRANK energy meets smart tech.
High intensity. Real insights. No shortcuts.

See you on the floor this Saturday.

CRANKsters will get hands-on with the Galaxy Watch8 - exploring how it tracks effort, movement, recovery, and real-time workout data. In selected classes, you won’t just see it on display - you’ll train with it, feel the difference, and see your performance come to life as you move.

CRANKsters attending 10am SHAPE, 10:30am RIDE, and 11:30am RIDE will have the chance to use the device during class.

This is where CRANK energy meets smart tech.
High intensity. Real insights. No shortcuts.

See you on the floor this Saturday.

text:
لا تشتروا سامسونج، أنا حقًا أشعر بخيبة أمل كبيرة من تجربتي الأخيرة.

بعد تحديث البرنامج، ظهرت فجأة مشكلة خط أخضر على شاشة هاتفي - مع العلم أنه لا يوجد أي تلف مادي أو ناتج عن الماء. الأمر المحبط هو أن هذا حدث بعد ثلاث سنوات فقط من انتهاء فترة الضمان، مما جعلني غير مؤهل لاستبدال الشاشة لمرة واحدة ببضعة أيام فقط.

بصراحة، أشعر بالظلم عندما تظهر مثل هذه المشاكل مباشرة بعد التحديثات، مما يترك العملاء يتحملون التكلفة. لطالما وثقت بأجهزة سامسونج واستخدمتها في عائلتي، لكن هذه التجربة كانت مزعجة للغاية.

آمل أن تتحمل سامسونج مسؤوليتها وأن تدعم العملاء الذين يواجهون هذه المشاكل، حتى لو كان ذلك يتجاوز قليلاً حدود سياسة الضمان.

#مشكلة_الخط_الأخضر #تجربة_سامسونج #دعم_العملاء

text:
@samsunggulf The #GalaxyUnpacked event is going to be epic! 😍 I'm super excited about the new Samsung Galaxy S25 series, especially the AI-powered features that are taking mobile photography and interaction to the next level 🌟. The ProScaler AI tool is a game-changer, enhancing image scaling quality by 40% and making visuals sharper and brighter 📸. The Virtual Aperture feature is also mind-blowing, giving users DSLR-like control over depth of field and allowing for stunning portrait shots 🎨. And let's not forget the AI Nightography, which takes low-light photography to new heights 🌃. The Multimodal AI agents are also impressive, understanding text, speech, images, and videos to provide seamless interactions 🤖. The One UI 7 AI-powered OS is designed to learn your habits and preferences, offering personalized suggestions and protecting your privacy with on-device AI 💯. With features like Circle to Search 2.0, Audio Eraser, and Auto Trim, the Galaxy S25 is shaping up to be a true AI companion.  Huge thanks to Samsung for this amazing giveaway 🙏. Fingers crossed, hoping to win 😊... Manifesting that win!

DONE. ALL RULES FOLLOWED ✅✅
Winning this giveaway would be a dream come true, and I'm manifesting it with pure joy and excitement. 😍
Followed all the rules sincerely ✅

text:
@samsunggulf The #GalaxyUnpacked event is going to be epic! 😍 I'm super excited about the new Samsung Galaxy S25 series, especially the AI-powered features that are taking mobile photography and interaction to the next level 🌟. The ProScaler AI tool is a game-changer, enhancing image scaling quality by 40% and making visuals sharper and brighter 📸. The Virtual Aperture feature is also mind-blowing, giving users DSLR-like control over depth of field and allowing for stunning portrait shots 🎨. And let's not forget the AI Nightography, which takes low-light photography to new heights 🌃. The Multimodal AI agents are also impressive, understanding text, speech, images, and videos to provide seamless interactions 🤖. The One UI 7 AI-powered OS is designed to learn your habits and preferences, offering personalized suggestions and protecting your privacy with on-device AI 💯. With features like Circle to Search 2.0, Audio Eraser, and Auto Trim, the Galaxy S25 is shaping up to be a true AI companion.  Huge thanks to Samsung for this amazing giveaway 🙏. Fingers crossed, hoping to win 😊... Manifesting that win!

text:
أنا عميل لشركة سامسونج منذ سنوات، وكنت أشتري أحدث هواتفها تقريبًا كل عام. لكن للأسف تجربتي هذا العام كانت مخيبة للآمال بشكل كبير.
طريقة بيع المنتجات هذا العام غير منظمة، وخدمة العملاء كانت غير مهنية وبطيئة جدًا في الرد، ولم يكن هناك اهتمام حقيقي بحل المشكلة. هذا أمر غير مقبول من شركة عالمية بحجم سامسونج.
بصراحة أشعر باستياء شديد من هذه التجربة، وإذا استمر مستوى الخدمة بهذا الشكل فلن أفكر في شراء منتجات سامسونج مرة أخرى، بل قد أفكر في الانتقال إلى شركة أخرى.
أتمنى أن تقوم سامسونج بمراجعة مستوى خدمة العملاء وتحسين تجربة الشراء، لأن العملاء الأوفياء يستحقون معاملة أفضل من ذلك.
:
I have been a Samsung customer for many years and I usually purchase the latest Samsung phone almost every year. Unfortunately, my experience this year has been extremely disappointing.
The product purchasing process this year has been poorly organized, and the customer service representatives have been unprofessional and very slow to respond. There was no real effort to properly resolve the issue. This level of service is unacceptable from a global company like Samsung.
Honestly, I am very frustrated with this experience. If this level of service continues, I will seriously consider switching to another brand.
I hope Samsung reviews the quality of its customer service and improves the purchasing experience, because loyal customers deserve a much better experience.

text:
بصراحة أنا مستاء جداً من تجربة الشراء هذا العام مع سامسونج.
أنا عميل للشركة منذ سنوات، وكل عام تقريباً أشتري أحدث هاتف لديهم، لكن ما يحدث هذا العام يعتبر فشلاً واضحاً في تجربة البيع وخدمة العملاء.
للأسف تعامل موظفي خدمة العملاء كان غير مهني، بطيء، ولا يوجد اهتمام حقيقي بحل مشاكل العملاء. تجربة الشراء أصبحت مزعجة ومحبطة، وهذا أمر غير متوقع من شركة عالمية مثل سامسونج.
بناءً على تجربتي الأخيرة، لا أنصح حالياً بشراء منتجات سامسونج حتى يتم تحسين خدمة العملاء وطريقة التعامل مع العملاء بشكل أكثر احترافية واحتراماً.
أتمنى أن تقوم الشركة بمراجعة ما يحدث وتحسين مستوى الخدمة، لأن العملاء الأوفياء يستحقون تجربة أفضل من ذلك.

text:
لا تشتروا سامسونج، أنا حقًا أشعر بخيبة أمل كبيرة من تجربتي الأخيرة.

بعد تحديث البرنامج، ظهرت فجأة مشكلة خط أخضر على شاشة هاتفي - مع العلم أنه لا يوجد أي تلف مادي أو ناتج عن الماء. الأمر المحبط هو أن هذا حدث بعد ثلاث سنوات فقط من انتهاء فترة الضمان، مما جعلني غير مؤهل لاستبدال الشاشة لمرة واحدة ببضعة أيام فقط.

بصراحة، أشعر بالظلم عندما تظهر مثل هذه المشاكل مباشرة بعد التحديثات، مما يترك العملاء يتحملون التكلفة. لطالما وثقت بأجهزة سامسونج واستخدمتها في عائلتي، لكن هذه التجربة كانت مزعجة للغاية.

آمل أن تتحمل سامسونج مسؤوليتها وأن تدعم العملاء الذين يواجهون هذه المشاكل، حتى لو كان ذلك يتجاوز قليلاً حدود سياسة الضمان.

#مشكلة_الخط_الأخضر #تجربة_سامسونج #دعم_العملاء

text:
أنا عميل لشركة سامسونج منذ سنوات، وكنت أشتري أحدث هواتفها تقريبًا كل عام. لكن للأسف تجربتي هذا العام كانت مخيبة للآمال بشكل كبير.
طريقة بيع المنتجات هذا العام غير منظمة، وخدمة العملاء كانت غير مهنية وبطيئة جدًا في الرد، ولم يكن هناك اهتمام حقيقي بحل المشكلة. هذا أمر غير مقبول من شركة عالمية بحجم سامسونج.
بصراحة أشعر باستياء شديد من هذه التجربة، وإذا استمر مستوى الخدمة بهذا الشكل فلن أفكر في شراء منتجات سامسونج مرة أخرى، بل قد أفكر في الانتقال إلى شركة أخرى.
أتمنى أن تقوم سامسونج بمراجعة مستوى خدمة العملاء وتحسين تجربة الشراء، لأن العملاء الأوفياء يستحقون معاملة أفضل من ذلك.
:
I have been a Samsung customer for many years and I usually purchase the latest Samsung phone almost every year. Unfortunately, my experience this year has been extremely disappointing.
The product purchasing process this year has been poorly organized, and the customer service representatives have been unprofessional and very slow to respond. There was no real effort to properly resolve the issue. This level of service is unacceptable from a global company like Samsung.
Honestly, I am very frustrated with this experience. If this level of service continues, I will seriously consider switching to another brand.
I hope Samsung reviews the quality of its customer service and improves the purchasing experience, because loyal customers deserve a much better experience.

اربط الحذاء، واشحن الكاميرا، ثم دع فضولك يقودك. 
سنحول مهرجان سكة للفنون والتصميم إلى ساحة للتصوير الليلي، في أجواء حافلة بالثقافة والألوان والقصص مع فرصة لربح هاتف Galaxy S25.
انضم إلى @sahalsafar الذي سيقدم لك نصائح عن التصوير المباشر، والأفكار المبتكرة، والكثير من اللقطات المميزة. 🔥
🗓 25 يناير | 7 – 10 مساءً *بسبب تقلّب الأحوال الجوية، تم تأجيل موعد المسابقة إلى 31 يناير 
🗓 29 يناير | 7 – 10 مساءً
👥 20 شخص لكل جولة فقط 
 
متحمس؟
أجب ب "نعم" في خانة التعليقات، وسنراسلك لحجز مكانك.
 
إلى اللقاء في سكة. هيا لنمشِ، نصور ونبتكر.

Lace up your walking shoes, charge your camera, and bring your curiosity. 
We’re turning Sikka Art Festival into a night-time photo playground, packed with culture, colours, stories, and a chance to win a Galaxy S25 (yes, really).

Join @sahalsafar for a guided photowalk with live shooting tips, creative hacks, and plenty of “wait… that shot is 🔥” moments.

🗓 25 Jan | 7–10 PM *Date has been changed to 31st of Jan due to weather conditions 
🗓 29 Jan | 7–10 PM
👥 Only 20 spots per session (because chaos is not a vibe)

Feeling click-happy?
Comment Yes and we’ll slide into your DMs to lock your spot.
See you at Sikka. Let’s walk, capture, and create.

@samsunggulf The Samsung Galaxy S25 series is packed with mind-blowing features 🚀, but what gets me super excited is the ProScaler AI tool 📸 - imagine upscaling images in real-time, boosting quality by 40%! 😍 The new Virtual Aperture system is also a game-changer, offering pro-grade photo and video capture tools with manual controls 🎥. And let's not forget the Night Video with Audio Eraser 🌃, minimizing noise and allowing for crisp videos even in low-light conditions. The analog-style filters 🎨, enhanced AI capabilities 🤖, and the impressive 50MP ultrawide lens 📸 are just icing on the cake 🎂. With the Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Elite processor, this phone is about to get ridiculously fast 🚀! Huge thanks to the team for this incredible giveaway 🙏. Fingers crossed, hoping to win 😊... Manifesting that win! #GalaxyUnpacked 🥰😍💕✨

text:
@samsunggulf The #GalaxyUnpacked event is going to be epic! 😍 I'm super excited about the new Samsung Galaxy S25 series, especially the AI-powered features that are taking mobile photography and interaction to the next level 🌟. The ProScaler AI tool is a game-changer, enhancing image scaling quality by 40% and making visuals sharper and brighter 📸. The Virtual Aperture feature is also mind-blowing, giving users DSLR-like control over depth of field and allowing for stunning portrait shots 🎨. And let's not forget the AI Nightography, which takes low-light photography to new heights 🌃. The Multimodal AI agents are also impressive, understanding text, speech, images, and videos to provide seamless interactions 🤖. The One UI 7 AI-powered OS is designed to learn your habits and preferences, offering personalized suggestions and protecting your privacy with on-device AI 💯. With features like Circle to Search 2.0, Audio Eraser, and Auto Trim, the Galaxy S25 is shaping up to be a true AI companion.  Huge thanks to Samsung for this amazing giveaway 🙏. Fingers crossed, hoping to win 😊... Manifesting that win!

text:
I am extremely disappointed with my recent experience with Samsung  Samsung Global Samsung Semiconductor 
I purchased a Samsung S24 Ultra only two months ago on Last November 2025 and the device suddenly powered off  and became completely unresponsive. An official Samsung service center confirmed it is a hardware defect . They have to replace motherboard !!!!
However, I was informed that replacement is “not possible after 2 weeks,” and only repair is being offered. 
For a premium flagship device with a confirmed hardware failure within two months, this is not the level of quality or service I expected from Samsung.
I have always trusted Samsung products, but this situation is very concerning. I respectfully request Samsung Gulf to review this case and provide a fair resolution.

سنحول مهرجان سكة للفنون والتصميم إلى ساحة للتصوير الليلي، في أجواء حافلة بالثقافة والألوان والقصص مع فرصة لربح هاتف Galaxy S25.
انضم إلى @sahalsafar الذي سيقدم لك نصائح عن التصوير المباشر، والأفكار المبتكرة، والكثير من اللقطات المميزة. 🔥
🗓 25 يناير | 7 – 10 مساءً *بسبب تقلّب الأحوال الجوية، تم تأجيل موعد المسابقة إلى 31 يناير 
🗓 29 يناير | 7 – 10 مساءً
👥 20 شخص لكل جولة فقط 
 
متحمس؟
أجب ب "نعم" في خانة التعليقات، وسنراسلك لحجز مكانك.
 
إلى اللقاء في سكة. هيا لنمشِ، نصور ونبتكر.

Lace up your walking shoes, charge your camera, and bring your curiosity. 
We’re turning Sikka Art Festival into a night-time photo playground, packed with culture, colours, stories, and a chance to win a Galaxy S25 (yes, really).

Join @sahalsafar for a guided photowalk with live shooting tips, creative hacks, and plenty of “wait… that shot is 🔥” moments.

🗓 25 Jan | 7–10 PM *Date has been changed to 31st of Jan due to weather conditions 
🗓 29 Jan | 7–10 PM
👥 Only 20 spots per session (because chaos is not a vibe)

Feeling click-happy?
Comment Yes and we’ll slide into your DMs to lock your spot.
See you at Sikka. Let’s walk, capture, and create.

text:
أنا عميل لشركة سامسونج منذ سنوات، وكنت أشتري أحدث هواتفها تقريبًا كل عام. لكن للأسف تجربتي هذا العام كانت مخيبة للآمال بشكل كبير.
طريقة بيع المنتجات هذا العام غير منظمة، وخدمة العملاء كانت غير مهنية وبطيئة جدًا في الرد، ولم يكن هناك اهتمام حقيقي بحل المشكلة. هذا أمر غير مقبول من شركة عالمية بحجم سامسونج.
بصراحة أشعر باستياء شديد من هذه التجربة، وإذا استمر مستوى الخدمة بهذا الشكل فلن أفكر في شراء منتجات سامسونج مرة أخرى، بل قد أفكر في الانتقال إلى شركة أخرى.
أتمنى أن تقوم سامسونج بمراجعة مستوى خدمة العملاء وتحسين تجربة الشراء، لأن العملاء الأوفياء يستحقون معاملة أفضل من ذلك.
:
I have been a Samsung customer for many years and I usually purchase the latest Samsung phone almost every year. Unfortunately, my experience this year has been extremely disappointing.
The product purchasing process this year has been poorly organized, and the customer service representatives have been unprofessional and very slow to respond. There was no real effort to properly resolve the issue. This level of service is unacceptable from a global company like Samsung.
Honestly, I am very frustrated with this experience. If this level of service continues, I will seriously consider switching to another brand.
I hope Samsung reviews the quality of its customer service and improves the purchasing experience, because loyal customers deserve a much better experience.

text: Looks like 10:00 SHAPE is about to be metabolic x1000
postCaption:
Samsung takes over CRANK.

This Saturday, 31st, Samsung is taking over CRANK at Alserkal Avenue for a full day of performance, data, and next-level training.

CRANKsters will get hands-on with the Galaxy Watch8 - exploring how it tracks effort, movement, recovery, and real-time workout data. In selected classes, you won’t just see it on display - you’ll train with it, feel the difference, and see your performance come to life as you move.

CRANKsters attending 10am SHAPE, 10:30am RIDE, and 11:30am RIDE will have the chance to use the device during class.

This is where CRANK energy meets smart tech.
High intensity. Real insights. No shortcuts.

See you on the floor this Saturday.

#GalaxyWatch8

text:
As a user of the Samsung S series, I acquired an S25 Ultra last year. To protect my device, I installed a high-quality screen protector and a highly recommended phone case. After several months of use, I observed a black spot in the upper right corner of my phone screen, which, upon research, I identified as a dead pixel.
Given that my phone is under warranty, I presented it to a service center in Burjuman. There, two technicians, without conducting a physical inspection, asserted that it was physical damage and therefore not covered under warranty, and their demeanor was unprofessional. I subsequently contacted Samsung Care to report the situation. They registered my complaint and assured me that someone would follow up promptly; however, a month elapsed without any response.
Consequently, I proceeded to pre-order a new S26 Ultra, utilizing the trade-in option. A Samsung representative arrived at my location to inspect the S25 Ultra and informed me that its trade-in value would be significantly diminished due to the pixel damage. Despite my explanation that the device was under warranty, the representative declined to proceed and departed.
I again contacted Samsung Care, and they advised me to deliver the device to a Samsung service center for repair. A few days later, I received a call from Samsung stating that my phone could not be repaired under warranty because the exact cause of the pixel damage could not be determined. They noted the absence of any physical damage to the phone's exterior. The tone of this communication implied a disregard for the customer's perspective. I intend to continue advocating for a resolution until Samsung addresses this issue.

Dear Samsung,
In the stillness of moonlit dreams, I write to you today — not as a person tied to a screen, but as a person enamored of innovation tempered by beauty. Your phones are not tools, they are palimpsests of hopes once voiced in trance, now glowing in effulgent shape.
Each stroke is mellifluous — somewhat so silky, I'm tracing gossamer silk across the cosmos. My thoughts glide like zephyrs across your screen, smooth and ageless, in lines of eunoia.
Even the calming thrum of an alert is sonorous — rich and velvet-smooth, never jarring. It is susurrus, a soft whisper of attachment in a cosmos too discordant.
There is something halcyon in the manner you preserve moments, as noctilucent dreams locked in pixels. An interval of time smitten with luminous color, depicted in tones of opaline, touched by a lens that sees not merely light — but soul.
Your screens do not mirror — they glow. Your processors do not calculate — they glide. Your presence is not convenience — it is ephemeral charm, grabbed and rendered crystalline.
Thank you for allowing one to behold even the mundane as diaphanous, where thought is form and loveliness is inscribed not just in form — but in the very outline of functionality.
With limitless aplomb and tender marvel,
— A fan wrapped in vellichor
